accepted: typed PluginWorkspaceRuntime exposes the experimental workspace register seam; WorkspaceAdaptors now names the open env/header maps; ControlPlaneSmoke.pluginWorkspaceRegistration covers register/configure/create/local-target behavior and extra preservation; matrix/docs/README updated; format/build/inventory/smoke/public/diff gates pass

accepted: typed QuestionRuntime models QuestionID/request/answer/tool DTOs plus ask/list/reply/reject; QuestionSmoke covers pending promise resolution/rejection, unknown no-ops, multiple questions/requests, per-directory isolation, optional tool metadata, and dispose/reload rejection; matrix/docs/README updated; format/build/inventory/smoke/public/diff gates pass

accepted: added typed opencodehx.patch.PatchRuntime plus PatchSmoke coverage for parsePatch, maybeParseApplyPatch, applyPatch add/update/delete/move/nested/error/edge cases, and verified planning; promoted patch/patch.test.ts to direct; docs and README updated; tracked non-blocking private-static d.ts output polish as opencodehx-1xw. Gates passed: npm run format:haxe; npm run build; npm run smoke; npm run inventory:matrix; npm run public:precommit; git diff --check.

accepted: built-in tool execution now decodes registry ToolCallInput/Unknown into typed input records; ToolResult and permission metadata use typed wrappers; typed-boundary scan/audit docs and baseline added; regression gates passed: npm run typed-boundary:scan, npm run build, npm run smoke, npm run test, npm run cli:smoke, npm run inventory:matrix, npm run public:precommit, npm run package:smoke, git diff --check.

accepted: SessionToolCall and ToolState DTOs now use ToolCallInput and ToolStateMetadata instead of raw Dynamic for tool input/state metadata; typed-boundary baseline ratcheted from 2348 to 2338 markers; AGENTS now directs module-level functions over empty static shell classes where appropriate. Gates passed: npm run typed-boundary:scan, npm run build, npm run smoke, npm run test, npm run public:precommit, npm run inventory:matrix, npm run cli:smoke, npm run package:smoke, git diff --check.
